examples: For someone without land or education, that still beats trying to make a living in Bihar.
Bihar, a few hundred miles north of Kolkata, is where the vast majority of rickshaw pullers come from.
And if Bihar can turn around, any Indian region can.
Every train crossing the local railway station was crammed with eclipse watchers from all over Bihar.
The day he was indicted, many shops across Bihar drew down their shutters in protest.
